svg.title: Mini & Co. Sensory Classes — pull-up banner
svg.text: Gentle sensory play for babies aged 3–12 months
WEDNESDAYS · 11 AM & 1 PM · ORAN PARK LIBRARY, SANDOWN ROOM

text.tspan: fine motor skills, attention and curiosity
Songs, mirroring and play prompts that
help parent and baby tune in to each
babies explore at their own pace — and
A welcoming room where mums feel
included, supported and want to come
